creator: neil@darlow.co.uk
text:
PythonTwisted refers to a number of ports which are a dependency of
jabber-msn-transport, i.e. py-twistedCore, py-twistedWeb and
py-twistedWords, all of which have received updates.

Although one, or more, of these packages breaks jabber-msn-transport it
is jabber-msn-transport itself that needs to be updated. garga is
usually very efficient at doing this when given a bug report.
